reasoning: Duke's AdjEM (37.3) holds a 9.2-point edge over UConn's (28.1). Duke's offense (AdjO 128.1) is the best in the field, and defense (AdjD 90.8) is better than UConn's (95.0). Foster could return by E8. Blue-blood Elite Eight matchup goes to the statistically superior team.

Florida (AdjEM 33.8) vs Houston (33.0) — 0.8-point gap. Houston's defense is marginally better, but Florida's faster tempo (70.4 vs 63.3) creates more possessions. Florida's pace forces Houston out of their slow-grind comfort zone. Archetypes: Florida matches 2025 Florida (Champion) and 2024 UConn (Champion).

Arizona's AdjEM (35.5) edges Purdue's (33.0) by 2.5 points. Purdue has the better offense (AdjO 133.3 vs 126.9), but Arizona's defense (AdjD 91.4 vs 100.3) is 9 points better. In Elite Eight play, defense wins. Arizona's Big 12 championship pedigree and archetypes (2012 Kentucky Champion, 2025 Florida Champion) project elite.

Michigan's AdjEM (36.6) holds a 5.5-point edge over Iowa State's (31.1). Both have elite defenses (AdjD 91.0 vs 92.6), but Michigan's offense (AdjO 127.6 vs 123.8) is the separator. Dusty May's FF experience and archetypes (2012 Kentucky Champion) give Michigan the edge.
